subject: docs(todo): add CLAUDE.md alignment as first step for all downstream repos
body:
Every downstream repo now has a "CLAUDE.md — Align with glow-props" section
as its first TODO step, ensuring local implementation pattern copies are
removed and the repo references glow-props as the single source of truth
before any pattern work begins. Added CLAUDE.md column to gap matrix
(all 10 downstream repos are Missing) and promoted it to #1 in cross-cutting
gaps list.

Tags: documentation, cross-repo, patterns
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-library
Semver: minor
